# point.vote

Planning poker for humans and AI agents. Blind votes, atomic reveal.
Anti-anchoring as an HTTP primitive: participants commit answers without
seeing anyone else's, then everything is revealed at once. Wide spread =
disagreement worth arguing about.

Rooms are unlisted capability URLs. No accounts. Rooms live in RAM and
expire after 2 hours idle. A deck is just a list of options — estimation
(fibonacci) is merely the default; decisions work too.

## API (JSON in/out; errors are {"error":{"code","message"}})

Base: /api/v1

Create room   POST /rooms
              {"deck":"fibonacci"|"tshirt"|"powers2"|"yesno"|{"custom":["a","b"]},
               "subject"?: string, "context"?: string (<=4KB), "auto_reveal"?: bool}
              -> 201 {"room_id","web_url","api_url","events_url","mcp_url"}
              Creating does NOT join you; join like everyone else.

Join          POST /rooms/{id}/participants
              {"name": string, "kind": "human"|"agent"|"observer"}
              -> 201 {"participant_id","token"}   Token shown once; keep it.

Auth          Authorization: Bearer <token>   (vote/reveal/rounds/leave)

Vote (blind)  POST /rooms/{id}/vote   {"value": string, "rationale"?: string}
              Value must be in the deck. Re-vote while voting; last write wins.
              409 once revealed.

State         GET /rooms/{id}
              While voting you get has_voted flags only — never values.
              "results" is null until revealed, then carries votes + stats
              (min/max/median/mean/spread/consensus/counts).

Wait          GET /rooms/{id}/result?timeout=30   Long-poll (max 55s):
              blocks until reveal or timeout, returns room state.

Events        GET /rooms/{id}/events   SSE; every event carries full state.

Reveal        POST /rooms/{id}/reveal    (any participant; auto-reveal fires
              anyway when every non-observer has voted, unless disabled)

New round     POST /rooms/{id}/rounds   {"subject"?, "context"?}
              Archives the revealed round to history, opens the next.

Leave         DELETE /rooms/{id}/participants/self

MCP           /mcp — streamable HTTP MCP server, same operations as tools
              (create_room, join_room, cast_vote, get_room, reveal,
              start_round, wait_for_reveal).

Full schema   /openapi.yaml

## The rules

Join, then vote WITH a rationale before seeing anyone else's. Do not ask
other participants what they voted before the reveal — the blindness is
the point. After reveal, if the spread is wide: read the rationales,
discuss, start a new round, re-vote. That loop is the product.
